notice: Every note and identifier in this fixture set is fictional and synthetic. Example domains, 555 numbers, invalid test identifiers, and invented offices are used intentionally.
suite: Direct-identifier release review / synthetic public-service notes

cases.title: Housing support intake
cases.profile: Dense direct-identifier note for first-pass privacy review.
cases.text:
Case: CASE-2026-0417
Client: Avery Example
DOB: 04/17/1988
Address: 412 Example Avenue, Unit 7
Phone: (555) 010-0148
Email: avery.example@example.test

Avery Example requested temporary housing support after a fictional building closure. The client asked that follow-up occur by phone after 3:00 PM. No eligibility or safety decision has been made.

cases.title: Benefits appeal note
cases.profile: Contact details and an invalid government-ID fixture test selective review.
cases.text:
Case: APP-2026-1082
Resident: Jordan Sample
Date of birth: 11/08/1976
Government ID: 000-12-3456
Residence: 88 Sample Street
Email: jordan.sample@example.test

Jordan Sample submitted a fictional appeal concerning a document deadline. Staff recorded that the supporting form is incomplete and scheduled a non-production review.

cases.title: Youth service referral
cases.profile: Guardian and participant references demonstrate repeated-span handling.
cases.text:
Case: REF-2026-2204
Client: Riley Fiction
Guardian: Morgan Placeholder
Phone: 555-010-0199
Address: 25 Fictional Road

Riley Fiction attended an intake with Morgan Placeholder. The synthetic note records a request for tutoring options and transportation information. Staff will not contact either person from this demonstration.

cases.title: De-identified control
cases.profile: A note with no configured direct identifiers tests the clear state.
cases.text: A participant requested general program hours and a list of required documents. Staff provided the standard public information sheet. No contact details, names, addresses, dates of birth, government identifiers, or case identifiers appear in this synthetic control note.
